# textElementType

**Instance Property**

The enumerated type of the text element.

## Declaration

```swift
var textElementType: PHProjectTextElement.ElementType { get }
```

## Describing a Text Element

- **text**: The raw unformatted string for the text element.
- **attributedText**: The stylized attributed string for the text element as presented to the user in Photos.
- **PHProjectTextElement.ElementType**: An enumeration of the type of text element.

items.description: The raw unformatted string for the text element.
